elephant: The Elephant Door oasis at night: serene water reflecting moonlight, gentle elephants

castle: Stone fortress visible through mist, security, fortress of soul

library: Archive of dreams: books, soft light, knowledge sanctuary

garden: Growing place: green abundance, natural growth, flourishing

door: Threshold between worlds: doors, passages, choice
